channel.title: [Archive] Jono and Ben
channel.description: Jono and Ben's daily podcasts from their 3-7pm radio show on The Rock. [archive]
channel.itunes:subtitle: Jono and Ben's daily podcasts from their 3-7pm radio show on The Rock. [archive]
channel.itunes:summary: If you like hard hitting news and informative talk...then be sure to listen to something else. But if you're after plenty of laughs, idiocy, and even the odd tear, then tune in to Jono and Ben! [archive]
channel.itunes:author: The Rock

item.title: Jono and Ben Podcast Tuesday 6 December
item.description: On Tuesday's show - It's Jono and Ben's second to last show on The Rock and we play some of the boy's best moments.
item.itunes:subtitle: On Tuesday's show - It's Jono and Ben's second to last show on The Rock and we play some of the boy's best moments.

item.title: Jono and Ben Podcast Wednesday 7 December
item.description: On Wednesday's show - It's Jono and Ben's last ever show in The Rock and what better way to depart than with an Office Christmas Party.
